summary: W1623 adds a one-input W1519 closed-embedding-closedness route for the direct-localization boundary product-data path. The route extracts W973 closed-embedding closedness data from the W1519 selected-cochain convergence input, obtains W718 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram components and a W519 mapped-cokernel closed-embedding provider, converts the closed-embedding facts to closed-map facts, derives W735 closed-map exact inputs, and feeds the existing W1622 target-data/global-closed-embedding-components route. The route is exposed through the bounded-derived StablePackage surface and OriginalFourTaskProductData. This advances the original four-task contract surface but does not construct a nullary positive witness.
obligations_discharged: The W1623 closed-map route derives W1622's W735 exact-input data from one W1519 selected-cochain convergence input by converting W1519's closed-embedding closedness data to closed-map data.
The W1623 closed-map route derives W1622's W718 global closed-embedding component provider from W1519's W973 closed-embedding closedness data.
The W1623 closed-map route derives the W519 mapped-cokernel closed-map provider from the W519 mapped-cokernel closed-embedding provider using IsClosedEmbedding.isClosedMap.
The W1623 closed-map route exposes direct-localization boundary inputs, accepted stable evidence, bounded-derived output, and ready stable-certificate evidence through the existing W1622 route.

The W1623 closed-map route is now available as a BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage and as OriginalFourTaskProductData with equality back to W1622 and to the canonical direct-localization boundary package.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: A caller using the W1623 closed-map path no longer supplies separate W735 closed-map branch data.
A caller using the W1623 closed-map path no longer supplies separate W718 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component data.
A caller using the W1623 closed-map path no longer supplies separate W519 mapped-cokernel closed-map data.
The required-declaration audit now covers the W1623 route declarations, StablePackage bridge, and matching OriginalFourTaskProductData bridge.
The checkpoint preserves W1622/W1621/W1620/W879/W880's product-facing surface while replacing the two-input W1622 frontier with one W1519 input.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
The original four-task contract is not complete because the W1623 product-data constructor still requires caller-supplied W1519 selected-cochain convergence input data.
A concrete nullary W1519 selected-cochain convergence input is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary W987 closed-embedding closedness input feeding the W1519 surface is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
remaining_work: Construct concrete nullary W1519 selected-cochain convergence input data or a stronger route that eliminates that remaining branch input.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source-triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
